events.title: Morača Riverside Parkrun
events.description: Free weekly timed 5 km run along the Morača river paths. All paces welcome — walkers too. Meet at the Moskovski bridge ten minutes before the start.

events.title: Sunday Organic Market at Mall of Montenegro Square
events.description: Organic and small-farm producers from across Montenegro: vegetables, cheeses, honey, herbs and homemade preserves. Every Sunday morning.

events.title: Montenegro Tech Meetup: AI in the Balkans
events.description: Monthly developer meetup with talks on practical AI adoption in regional startups, followed by networking. Talks in English. Pizza and drinks provided by sponsors.

events.title: Family Day on Gorica Hill
events.description: Adventure park sessions, orienteering for kids, picnic areas and a treasure hunt through the pine forest on Gorica hill. Organised by the city's sports association.

events.title: Podgorica Summer Scene — Opening Concert
events.description: The capital's free summer programme opens on Independence Square with a major regional pop-rock act. The Summer Scene continues through July with weekly concerts, theatre and cinema.

events.title: Montenegrin National Theatre: Season Premiere
events.description: Premiere of a new production at the Montenegrin National Theatre, directed by an acclaimed regional director. Performed in Montenegrin with English surtitles on Thursdays.

events.title: Warehouse Sessions: Techno Night
events.description: All-night techno event in a converted industrial space with international guest DJ and full sound system. 18+, tickets at the door while they last.

events.title: Podgorica Craft Beer Festival
events.description: Regional craft breweries pour their best on the banks of the Morača river, with food trucks and live bands across two stages over the weekend.

events.title: Podgorica International Book Fair
events.description: Publishers from across the Balkans, author signings, panel talks and a children's reading corner at the city's main exhibition hall.
